name: Clastix Kamaji
description: Hosted Control Plane Manager for Kubernetes that runs control planes as pods inside a management cluster for multi-tenancy.

seo.title: Clastix Kamaji — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Clastix Kamaji: Hosted Control Plane Manager for Kubernetes that runs control planes as pods inside a management cluster for multi-tenancy.

when_to_use: Multi-tenant Kubernetes with control planes as lightweight pods
Managed Kubernetes control planes for SaaS platform teams
Reducing costs by consolidating K8s control planes on shared infra
Kubernetes-as-a-Service platform on your own cloud infrastructure
Isolating tenant clusters without full dedicated master nodes

cons: Niche use case for most teams
review.verdict: A clever multi-tenant k8s pattern for platform teams, overkill for single-cluster shops.
review.best_for: Platform engineers offering hosted k8s control planes internally
review.not_for: Teams running a handful of clusters without tenant isolation needs
